name: Preview device size switching — desktop, tablet, mobile
description: When the user is on the Preview tab and clicks each device-size button (desktop, tablet, mobile) in the preview toolbar, the preview pane updates to show the corresponding device frame mockup.

planSteps.description: Click the second tab in the bottom dock to open the Preview view
Verify the preview pane is visible with three device-size buttons in the toolbar (desktop, tablet, mobile)
Click the tablet device-size button in the preview toolbar
Verify the preview pane now shows a tablet-shaped device frame mockup (taller than wide, with rounded borders)
Click the mobile device-size button in the preview toolbar
Verify the preview pane now shows a mobile-phone-shaped device frame mockup (narrow, with a notch at the top)
Click the desktop device-size button in the preview toolbar
Verify the preview pane returns to the desktop browser-style frame mockup with traffic-light dots (red, yellow, green)
